extensions.summary: Delete only unreachable artifacts immediately; requires an explicit flag and deterministic reachability proof.

stability.rationale: GC policy IDs are frozen for v0.0.0-mock; policy contents remain provisional while shared-store operations stay mock-only.
stability.replacement_target: Release-pinned store lifecycle policy bundles after shared install/store transactions are hardened.
